params.minRaters: Minimum raters needed for valid scoring after timeout.

cancelTask(uint256).notice: Cancel an under-subscribed task after deadline.         Refunds collateral to any raters who submitted.

createTask(bytes32,bytes32,uint8,uint8,u.notice: Create a task and submit the worker output in one call.         Any registered rater can then self-select to rate this task.

finalizeTask(uint256).notice: Finalize a task after timeout if minRaters have been reached.         Can be called by anyone. Also handles auto-finalization if maxRaters reached.

hasRated(uint256,address).notice: track whether an address has already rated a task.

scores(uint256,address).notice: RBTS scores after scoring (taskId => rater => payment in WAD).

submitRating(uint256,bool,int128).notice: Submit a rating for an open task. First-come-first-served up to maxRaters.
